center.name: 格鲁特岛
center.summary: 格鲁特岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Chestnut-backed buttonquail、Red-collared lorikeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is also native to Melville Island and Groote Eylandt

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It lives in woodland, open forest and rainforest, and has adapted to urban environments readily, being found in towns and cities. The species is sedentary, though follows food supply, such as banksias in flower in April and May on Groote Eylandt

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is also native to Melville Island and Groote Eylandt
